meta.name: Sigil Core — LOLBin (Windows / LOLBAS)
meta.author: NOMARJ <hello@sigilsec.ai>
meta.description: Detects abuse of native Windows binaries, scripts and libraries (living-off-the-land) for execution, download, and AWL bypass. Generated from LOLBAS (https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS@master f06df108eef2, retrieved 2026-06-22, GPL-3.0 (see upstream LICENSE)).
